statement: In every magma, Equation 1382 (`x = y * (((z * y) * w) * u)`) implies Equation 1891 (`x = (y * (x * x)) * (z * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0205
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z y) w) u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op x x)) (op z y))
